_note: Vague task description 'Handle settlement errors' against a Feature with retry, notification, and operator-retry ACs. Step 3 should ask about error scope, handling strategy, and entry/exit points — not invent answers.

feature.title: Feature: Settlement error handling
feature.body:
## Goal
Process merchant settlements reliably, surfacing failure states to both operators and merchants.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Failed settlements are retried up to 3 times before being marked as permanently failed
- [ ] Merchants receive an email notification when a settlement fails permanently
- [ ] Operators can view and manually retry failed settlements in the admin panel

## Edge Cases
- Retry exhausted during a downstream outage → mark as permanently failed but flag for auto-retry once the outage resolves
- Duplicate retry request from operator → idempotent; no second event emitted

## Domain Events
- `SettlementFailed` — emitted when a settlement attempt fails
- `SettlementPermanentlyFailed` — emitted after all retries are exhausted
- `SettlementRetryRequested` — emitted when an operator requests a manual retry

## Bounded Context
Settlement domain. Merchant actor. Payment processor integration boundary.
